comment.body:
Probability did not favour for a bounce at all (always my read not necessarily right.) I’ll tell you why for me.
Positive charm makes MM longer delta, as we approach the 5600 area where gamma started to increase, this gave us the info that there, Gamma makes vol goes down ( this choppy PA we’ve seen for 1h 30min) and as we are in negative Vanna we know that if vol goes down MM becomes longer delta as well. So this is why it’s wrong to look at gamma as support or resistance level. In this case I think that gamma slowed the price there only increasing the prob to go further lower and suppressive. Hope it makes sense (let me know what you think 👍🏻)
I got out my long just I realised this mechanism that would not be favour for what I bet on.
